gitUrl.description: Remote git repository URL (required for git store)

baseDir.description: Local filesystem directory (required for local store)

storesConfig.description: Path to JSON file defining multiple stores (overrides --store)

passthrough.description: Pass through to jsr.io when package not found locally (default: on, use --no-passthrough to disable)

fallbackVersion.description: Version to use when package source has no tagged versions
